title: Gimme That Spawner
description: You can now mine spawners and place them down as the same type.
body: This is a plugin that lets you mine spawners and place them back and keep the entity contained inside. To use this plugin you must mine a spawner with a pickaxe that has the silk touch enchantment applied to it. Once you place it down the spawner will remeber what mob was in it before it was mined. I hope you enjoy my plugin.
